name: RedDoorz Syariah near Paradiso Beach Sabang

contentSummary.displayName: RedDoorz Syariah near Paradiso Beach Sabang
contentSummary.defaultName: RedDoorz Syariah near Paradiso Beach Sabang
contentSummary.localeName: RedDoorz Syariah near Paradiso Beach Sabang

address.address1: Jl. Jendral Ahmad Yani, Lingkungan Soetedjo Gampang, Kuta Ateueh, Sukakarya, Kota Sabang

usefulInfo.name: Breakfast charge (unless included in room price)
License Id / Local Tax ID/ Entity Name

description.short: The car parking and the Wi-Fi are always free, so you can stay in touch and come and go as you please. Conveniently situated in the Sabang part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.

details.title: Infant 0-2 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 3-12 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 13 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

features.featureName: Physical distancing of at least 1 meter

reviews.hotelName: RedDoorz Syariah near Paradiso Beach Sabang

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Paradiso Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments: Strategic location, friendly staff, good service, clean environment, adequate facilities.
comments.originalComment: Lokasi strategis, staf ramah, pelayanan bagus, lingkungan bersih, fasilitas memadai

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Paradiso Beach Sabang
comments.reviewNegatives: Minimal shower water pressure, no linen or towel
comments.reviewPositives: Easy to park, large bed, water in the room
comments.reviewTitle: Nice basic place, great first stop for travelers arriving on the island, could use an upgrade on pillows

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Paradiso Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments: Maybe the water pressure is low so the shower doesn't work. Overall, very good. Will stay in the morning in the future.
comments.reviewTitle: ACCORDING TO THE PRICE AND I AM HAPPY.
comments.originalComment: Mungkin tekanan air rendah so shower tak berfungsi. Keseluruhannya, sangat baik. Akan menetap pagi di masa depan.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Paradiso Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments: If you're looking for a place just to sleep overnight, it's fine, but for a longer stay, it's lacking. The room is small, just enough space for sleeping and a little bit for praying/sitting; the bathroom is narrow and elongated like a grave, hehe. I happened to have a clogged toilet, so that made it a bit of a hassle... well, that's about it.
comments.originalComment: Kalo yg cari utk tidur malam aja cocok, tapi utk yg stay kurang deh, kamar kecil, muat t4 tdur & sedikit utk sholat/duduk, kamar mandi sempit kaya kuburan memanjang gitu hehe, kebetulan apes dapet wc mampet jadi kerjaan dikit lah ya.. yaudah gitu aja sih..

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Paradiso Beach Sabang
comments.reviewNegatives: Tout . Moisissures chambre laborieuse et sale et j en passe je déconseille

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Paradiso Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments: First greedy impression : check-in at 14:00, but we can make it 12:00 if you pay more. Bike rental at 150, everybody in town at 100. The bed was good, the A/C working, but the furniture was limited to a plastic stool : no table, no chair, no closet, not even a nail to hang your clothes... Corrugated roof noisy when the wind blows ..

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Paradiso Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments: Room suitable for short stay and budget friendly. Room was not provided with toiletries and towel. Just a basic small room for night sleeping only.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Paradiso Beach Sabang
comments.reviewNegatives:
Lantai atas
Kamar mandi super kecil sulit digunakan mandi dan BAB
Tidak ada air panas untuk mandi. 

Sepertinya itu kamar tambahan
comments.reviewPositives:
Dekat tempat makan
Bayar dihandle booking.com
AC cukup dingin
Pemilik ramah dan cekatan

comments.reviewComments: The water is small, the pillow covers smell as if they haven't been changed. The service is bad, they asked for cash, which is very strange. They said it's because the price in the app doesn't match, so there should be an additional fee.
comments.reviewTitle: The fish is small, the water is shallow.
comments.originalComment: Air nya kecil, sarung" Bantal bau seperti tidak diganti. Pelayanan jelek, minta uang cass, aneh bgt. Katanya krna hrga di apk tidak sesuai jdi hrus ada biaya tambahan lagi.

comments.reviewNegatives: The worst room  you can imagine, no towel, no noao, no toilet paper, ants on the dirty bed, massive cockroach clinging to the wall on my arrival

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Paradiso Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments: Regret staying here, because it doesn't match the application, when I arrived at the accommodation I was asked to add 50, disappointed, this will be my last stay.
comments.originalComment:
Nyesel tidur di sini,karna tidak sesuai aplikasi,pas sampai d penginapan disuruh nambah 50,
Kecewa, terakhir ini menginap.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Paradiso Beach Sabang
comments.reviewNegatives: There is no single thing to be liked.
comments.reviewPositives: There is no facilities as promised. Toilet is worst. Room is cozy. You should.not recommend to any customer in future.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.reviewComments: The room is small, and the TV doesn't have many channels.
comments.originalComment: Kamar nya kecil, TV tdk banyak chanelnya

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Paradiso Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments: untuk penginapan seputar kota sabang, penginapan ini cukup bagus, walau sprei dan bantal agak bau, mohon dicuci secara berkala, thankyou

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Paradiso Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments:
We are a family traveler with 2 teen daughters. We occupied 2 rooms on second floor at the time of our stay. Second floor was an unfinished project except the rooms that we use. The rooms and bathrooms were minimal but functional and could accommodate our needs.

We chose the place based on the name and we expected at least we could see some sceneries in the neighborhood. However, this place is situated in the middle of  village and the surroundings are residentials.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Paradiso Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments: Sudah jadi langganan setiap berlibur ke sabang, lokasi nyaman dan sangat cocok untuk berlibur

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Paradiso Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments: Kamarnya bau tak sedap. Spray handle toilet rusak. Minta pindah kamar katanya sama semua flashing toilet manual pake gayung dan extra charge. Akhirnya kami check out aj cari penginapan lain.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Paradiso Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments:
Fasilitas cukup baik, petugas ramah dan cepat respon namun kebersihan sangat kurang.  
Di kamar ada kecoa, banyak nyamuk dan muncul tungau di tempat tidurnya ,Mohon tingkatkan kebersihan . Thanks

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Paradiso Beach Sabang
comments.reviewComments: I highly recommend for those of you who want to vacation with your loved family to stay at RedDoorz.
comments.originalComment: Saya sangat merekomendasikan untuk Anda yang ingin liburan bersama keluarga tercinta untuk menginap di RedDoorz

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.reviewComments: The hotel is clean and the owner's service is good... if I go to Sabang again, I will definitely stay here again...
